description_long: This stuffed toy depicts a stylized animal with a tall, upright body and exaggerated features. Its fur is primarily a deep reddish-brown with a large white patch covering the chest and extending to the lower face. The toy has long, muscular arms that hang down past its waist, ending in large, clawed hands with yellowish-brown fingers. Its legs are thick and end in similarly clawed feet, also yellowish-brown, giving it a powerful stance. The face is expressive, with a wide open mouth showing teeth, a pronounced snout, and small, rounded ears on top of the head. The overall appearance is both playful and slightly fierce, making it a striking presence among urban toys.
description: A tall, upright stuffed animal with reddish-brown fur, a white chest, long arms, and clawed hands and feet. Its face is expressive with a wide open mouth and small ears.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated body, muscular arm, and profile of the snout and open mouth.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the broad back, symmetrical arms, and the back of the head with small ears.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with visible arm, leg, and side of the face.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the white chest, both arms, clawed hands and feet, and the expressive face with open mouth.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is open-mouthed with visible teeth, giving an impression of surprise or a playful roar. The eyes are wide and the mouth is stretched, adding to the expressive look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with both arms hanging down and legs straight, head facing forward.
